name: Date Nut Pinwheel Cookies
recipeInstructions:
For dough: Cream together the first five ingredients. Add the dry ingredients. Form the dough into a ball; cover and refrigerate for several hours. Separate the chilled dough into two balls. Roll each ball into a rectangle - the dough should be fairly thin.
For filling: Chop dates and place in a saucepan. Add the remaining ingredients and cook over low heat, stirring until a paste is formed (about 15 minutes). Cool completely.
Spread the filling on the dough; roll up the dough and filling in jelly-roll style. Slice into 1/2-inch thick pieces; bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes or until golden brown. Makes 2 to 3 dozen.
